component.name: QuillSpeak
component.summary: Local push-to-talk voice transcription for Linux desktops

description.p: QuillSpeak is a GTK4/libadwaita desktop utility for Linux voice typing. Hold a configured trigger, speak, release, and QuillSpeak transcribes locally with whisper.cpp models.
X11 sessions can use app-owned keyboard grabs. Wayland sessions use external hotkey tools that call the QuillSpeak trigger command, with Linux signal triggers available as a lower-level fallback.
Output actions can copy text to the system clipboard, run an optional script transform, and send a paste shortcut through external Linux tools.
Initial public packaging and documentation automation.
